testcase.name: test_wallet_transactions_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 with auth, got 500 assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase40_require_admin_user_refactoring.py:216: in test_wallet_transactions_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 with auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 with auth, got 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_coupons_admin_list_requires_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 429 assert 429 in [401, 403] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase40_require_admin_user_refactoring.py:263: in test_coupons_admin_list_requires_admin assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 429 E assert 429 in [401, 403] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
